title: Deprecate ap install with migration guidance
body:
## Summary
- make `ap install` fail with migration guidance
- point live deployment to `dots sync` and staging to `ap compile <profile> --out <dir>`

## Test
- `uv run --project agent-profile pytest agent-profile/tests/test_install_deprecation.py`

expanded scope: agent-profile/agent_profile/cli.py — required to route `ap install` to the new command policy
